Her striking blue eyes are round and set close together, complemented by medium-thick, straight eyebrows. She has a Roman nose with a high bridge and a pointed tip, and her lips are full with a deep Cupid's bow. Fine lines are visible around her eyes and forehead, and her head is angled directly forward with a neutral, calm expression. She is sitting on a wooden bench reading a paperback book, late afternoon light, full-body shot. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
